meta.title: Luiz Cristino — Full Stack & Mobile Developer
meta.description: Full Stack and Mobile Developer specializing in Flutter, React, Node.js and Laravel. Programming since 2000.

about.title: About Me
about.intro: I've started programming in 2000 as a hobby. Some early pet projects:
pet_projects: Own OTS (Open Tibia Server) with custom spells in Lua
A file batch renamer using regex
A DotA champion lore app in Java
about.current: Currently working with Web and hybrid mobile apps — mostly React Native and Flutter. Fell in love with Android since Froyo and that knowledge proved useful when bridging Android and React Native.
about.next: Next goal: a Master's Degree in AI. Always fascinated by it — currently self-taught in the area.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Open to discussing new projects and opportunities — reach out anytime.
